task: v5.3 is a go. CEO directive: spend 10x more. This is a big sprint — go ambitious. Here's the current state: agentforge@5.2.0, 2675 tests passing, 147 test files. v5.2 shipped: org-graph API, cross-workspace session learning (EmbeddingStore.indexSession), self-improvement loop (SelfProposalEngine.fromSessions), cost telemetry summary, dashboard cost page enhancements. Full v5 API surface: health, workspaces, sessions, costs/summary, agents, org-graph, proposals/from-sessions, embeddings/learn-session, routing, escalations, rbac, audit, plugins, WebSocket. Architecture: 8-package monorepo (shared, core, db, server, dashboard, embeddings, plugins-sdk, cli). SvelteKit dashboard on port 4751, Fastify server on port 4750. Your job: design the v5.3 sprint. Think big. 10x effort. What does AgentForge look like when it's truly autonomous, self-healing, and compounding? Propose the sprint items — P0/P1/P2 — with descriptions. Don't hold back.
response:
## Strategic Thesis

v5.3 is the sprint where AgentForge crosses the autonomy threshold — the system can observe its own performance, propose improvements, execute them in a sandbox, validate results, and promote changes with human approval as a guardrail, not a bottleneck.

**Three pillars: Closed-Loop Autonomy, Production Hardening, Intelligence Compounding.**

## P0 — Ship or Die

**P0-1: Proposal Execution Engine** — ProposalExecutor: takes a proposal, generates a plan, delegates to agents (Architect→Coder→Linter→Debugger), runs in sandboxed environment, produces validated diff with test results. New @agentforge/executor package.

**P0-2: Continuous Evaluation Pipeline** — Persistent background process watching session telemetry, cost, error rates. Auto-creates proposals on anomalies. EvaluationPipeline in core with metric collectors and anomaly detection.

**P0-3: Approval Gateway & Promotion** — Human-in-the-loop approval queue. Dashboard shows diff, test results, impact prediction, one-click approve/reject. RBAC-gated. Rollback capability.

**P0-4: Agent Performance Scoring** — AgentScorecard: task completion rate, cost efficiency, output quality, latency. Historical tracking. Feeds routing decisions. Dashboard agent performance page.

## P1 — Force Multipliers

**P1-1: Multi-Agent Orchestration Engine** — Orchestrator with workflow DSL (YAML pipelines), parallel fan-out, sequential pipelines, conditional branching, map-reduce. Cost budget enforcement per workflow.

**P1-2: Semantic Memory & Knowledge Graph** — Graph layer on embeddings+SQLite. Entity extraction from sessions. Relationship mapping. /knowledge REST endpoints. Dashboard knowledge explorer.

**P1-3: Canary Deployments** — Feature flag system. Traffic splitting for agent routing. Automatic rollback on metric degradation. Dashboard canary status view.

**P1-4: Cost Optimization Autopilot** — Always-on cost optimizer: model tier auto-selection, response caching with semantic similarity, batch aggregation, redundant invocation pruning.

**P1-5: Resilience & Self-Healing** — Circuit breakers on all agent calls, exponential backoff retry, graceful degradation, health-check-triggered self-healing workflows.

## P2 — Compounding Advantages

**P2-1: Agent Marketplace** — Plugin registry, agent template publishing, sandboxed execution, dashboard marketplace UI.

**P2-2: Natural Language Command Interface** — Conversational interface: NL → agent workflows/config/queries. Dashboard chat panel with knowledge graph context.

**P2-3: Cross-Instance Federation** — Opt-in sharing of learnings, proposals, performance data across AgentForge instances. Privacy-preserving aggregation.

**P2-4: Predictive Sprint Planning** — Analyzes historical data, generates draft sprint with effort estimates, risk scores, business impact. Dashboard sprint planning assistant.

**P2-5: OpenTelemetry Tracing** — Distributed tracing across all agent invocations. Trace storage and query API. Dashboard trace explorer with waterfall.

**P2-6: Adversarial Testing Framework** — Adversarial input generator, chaos engineering toolkit, regression suite gate on all self-modifications.

## Sprint Metrics Target

| Metric | v5.2 | v5.3 Target |
|--------|------|-------------|
| Test files | 147 | 280+ |
| Tests | 2,675 | 5,000+ |
| Packages | 8 | 10 |
| API endpoints | ~18 | ~35 |
| Self-modifications | 0 | System capable, human-approved |
